CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 04, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. April Reed represented Plaintiff, Marie France-Orellano. Also present the minor, Elizabeth Orellano. The Court having heard oral argument grants the compromise as prayed for in the petition. Order signed in open court.
